name: node-npmlog
title: node-npmlog
summary: Logger with custom levels and colored output for Node.js
description:
Logger with custom levels and colored output for Node.js
node-npmlog is a basic logger module used by npm.
.
npm is the package manager bundled with Node.js.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-npmlog because Logger with custom levels and colored output for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-npmlog as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-npmlog with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-npmlog --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
